description: Style NoteThis force 10 shoe is a comfortable shoe that performs well when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies!Product DetailsBlunt toed sport shoe in black and yellow with synthetic upper, central lace-ups, overlays and pattern on the midfootPadded collar and tongue with a mesh innerTough, foamy and lightweight rubber midsoleTough rubber outsole with groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
